message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "commercial",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Unclear payment terms",
      "rationale": "The contract includes placeholders for payment percentages, which can lead to disputes over compensation.",
      "mitigation": "Specify exact payment percentages in the contract to avoid ambiguity.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.7",
      "source_clause_id": "ca82a980-4f6d-4df8-9bde-a0a43a31b0d4",
      "source_excerpt": "For delivery on or before the delivery date specified in the Phase Agreement, Company shall pay to Developer ……… [insert number] % of the price for that Phase.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Acceptance test failure procedure",
      "rationale": "The procedure for handling acceptance test failures may not be robust enough, leading to potential project delays.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a clear and detailed procedure for acceptance test failures, including timelines and responsibilities.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "ed4aebb9-d94a-4b78-9864-86f4ebef5d61",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perform the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "legal",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Cancellation rights ambiguity",
      "rationale": "The conditions under which the Company can cancel the Phase Agreement are not clearly defined, which could lead to legal disputes.",
      "mitigation": "Clarify the conditions and process for cancellation in the contract.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "fbca1200-9bae-4a0a-8990-7b76afcf59c1",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Specification approval process",
      "rationale": "The approval process for programming specifications is solely at the Company's discretion, which may lead to delays if not managed properly.",
      "mitigation": "Define a timeline for approval and establish criteria for disapproval to streamline the process.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.3",
      "source_clause_id": "dbf855ba-d2d0-4e02-9211-1f306b7643e2",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon receipt of said programming specifications, Company will either approve or disapprove of said specifications. Such approval will be at the sole discretion of Company.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    }
  ]
}
